messages.content:
we have something like this:

A O A
A A A
A A A

Move the O to one place below. so the final result has to have an O and the rest being A
move the O to the left, and then down. the final result has to have an O and the rest being A
move the O to the left

move to left,
put the result
move it down
put the result

move the O to the left
